summary: Completed testing of Revenue Recognition Tracking feature for Admin Dashboard. All backend API tests passed (29/29) and frontend displays all required data correctly. The /api/admin/revenue/recognition endpoint returns correct data structure with cash_flow, revenue_recognition, tutor_payable, deferred_revenue, marketing_expense, outstanding_credits, session_summary, and accounting_summary sections. Key business rule verified: commission is ONLY recognized when sessions complete, not when credits purchased. Current state: RM200 cash collected, 0 sessions completed, so commission earned = RM0 and deferred revenue = RM200.
seed_data_creation: Used existing wallet data from previous testing. RM200 total top-up revenue, 8 paid credits + 1 bonus credit outstanding, 0 completed sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenue Recognition Tracking feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) API endpoint /api/admin/revenue/recognition returns all required fields correctly, 2) Business rule enforced: commission_earned = 0 and tutor_payable = 0 when no sessions completed, 3) Deferred revenue correctly equals cash collected (RM200) when no revenue is recognized, 4) Outstanding credits show 8 paid + 1 bonus = 9 total credits, 5) Frontend displays all sections: Cash Collected, Commission Earned, Tutor Payable (with paid/pending breakdown), Deferred Revenue (with calculation breakdown), Accounting Summary, and Revenue Recognition Policy notice, 6) Last 30 days values displayed for Cash Collected (RM100) and Commission Earned (RM0).
